description: Fixed, floating, fixed-to-float, and CMS bond pricer using the Hull-White interest rate model.

required_fields.name: credit_spread_bp
required_fields.description: Z-spread over the discount curve in basis points

required_fields.name: fixed_coupon_rate
required_fields.description: Annual coupon rate (decimal or %). Required when coupon_structure is 'fixed' or 'fixed_to_float'

required_fields.name: float_spread
required_fields.description: Spread over the forward rate. Required when coupon_structure is 'floating' or 'fixed_to_float'

required_fields.name: fixed_rate_end_date
required_fields.description: Switchover date from fixed to floating. Required when coupon_structure is 'fixed_to_float'

optional_fields.name: hw_calibration
optional_fields.description: Dict with 'enabled' key to toggle swaption calibration

optional_fields.name: float_reference_day_count
optional_fields.description: Day count for forward rate calculation (floating coupon)

optional_fields.name: float_floor
optional_fields.description: Optional floor on the floating coupon rate

optional_fields.name: cms_coupon_frequency
optional_fields.description: Fixed-leg frequency of the reference CMS swap

optional_fields.name: cms_day_count
optional_fields.description: Day count for the CMS leg

optional_fields.name: cms_spread
optional_fields.description: Additive spread on the CMS rate

optional_fields.name: cms_floor
optional_fields.description: Optional floor on the CMS-derived coupon

optional_fields.name: cms_cap
optional_fields.description: Optional cap on the CMS-derived coupon

optional_fields.name: call_dates
optional_fields.description: List of callable dates (DD-MM-YYYY) for callable bonds

optional_fields.name: call_price
optional_fields.description: Call price as % of par (default = par)

optional_fields.name: valuation_mode
optional_fields.description: Which redemption scenario to select as NPV

optional_fields.name: first_coupon_date
optional_fields.description: Override for irregular first coupon period (DD-MM-YYYY)
